response.justification: While the candidate brings 20 years of solid engineering experience and demonstrated entrepreneurial leadership, they lack the specialized AI expertise required for this AI Strategy principal role. Only recent exposure to AI infrastructure at re:cinq (April 2025) appears in the resume, with no prior products, platforms, or research background in AI/ML. The preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field is also absent.
strengths: 20 years of engineering experience across full-stack, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Proven entrepreneur: GISCollective founder (active 9+ years), demonstrates innovation and vision
Strong technical leadership: organized mentoring programs, taught workshops, and gave conference talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or research—only recent AI infrastructure work since April 2025
Lacks advanced degree in AI/ML field (preferred qualification for principal-level AI strategy role)
Background shows generalist engineer, not principal/director-level AI expertise or strategic vision in AI

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
20 years engineering experience meets minimum requirement
